tools.name: movies.getMovies
tools.description: Get the status any of your movies by passing your project ID in the project query parameter. You can get your project ID from the response of the POST request.

tools.name: movies.newMovie
tools.description: Submit a new movie rendering job.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
